title: Iran military threatens ‘harsh response’ to Israeli attacks in Lebanon

snapshot.title: Iran military threatens ‘harsh response’ to Israeli attacks in Lebanon
snapshot.description: BEIRUT/TEHRAN: Iran’s military threatened on Tuesday to respond to Israel after strikes in southern Lebanon killed four people despite a deal between Tehran and Washington ending the Middle East war, including in Lebanon. “If the child-killing army of the Zionist regime does not put an end to its acts of aggression in southern Lebanon, it should await a harsh response from the
snapshot.author: AFPReuters
snapshot.pageTitle: Iran military threatens ‘harsh response’ to Israeli attacks in Lebanon | Arab News
